A lot of people are having fun here, and it's okay, but sadly no one noticed the tragedy. It's been decades since this song, or any other masterpiece from 80s was released. Songs from simple minds, a-ha, for example. No one creates music like this anymore. I love modern music too, but since 2020 started, music degraded completely. Every other decade (00s, 10s) had something good, but now 80s music sounds like a lost happiness for me. When i think about death of the electronic music, i feel sad. But then i remember 80s and i feel even worse. I wish i was born in the time when life was worth living. There's no point of continuing if It's only going to get worse in the future. I'd rather be isolated than being friends with people who don't understand this elementary truth. And what's left of the good things? Music is bad. Movies are bad. Shows/animation are bad. Economy is bad. Internet is bad. But we have politics, hatred and war everywhere. Disgusting

haha get rickrolled (if you dont know cause you were born in 2024, rickrolling was AND STILL IS a popular meme, standing the test of time. When the GTA 5 TRAILER (yes TRAILER) was released, people were excited, so a person on 4chan (a popular social media at the time) uploaded it there, and redirected the link to this video. Because there were no ads, people got tricked. A meme at the time was duckroll, which was clicking on a link that redirected you to a duck with memes. So when Rick Astley's video did that, it got called "rickroll" and is STILL iconic today.
